stem:
The table shows selected values from function f.

x | f(x)
−1 | 16
0 | 17
1 | 18
2 | 19

Which of the following is the best description of function f ?
explanation: As x increases by 1, f(x) rises by a constant 1 each time. A constant rate of change means the function is linear, and since the values increase, f is an increasing linear function.
